user_query: 我有一批 10x scRNA-seq 数据，怀疑里面有不少双细胞，希望先识别这些异常细胞，再进入后续分析。

clarification_questions: 请提供大致数据规模，例如细胞数、spot 数或样本数。
请说明数据质量或噪声水平，例如 dropout、批次效应或低质量细胞是否严重。
请说明可用硬件，例如 CPU、GPU 或高内存服务器。
请说明物种，例如 human、mouse 或 cross-species。

user_query: 发育数据里我想看细胞状态变化方向和动态转录过程，输入里有 spliced 和 unspliced 层。

candidate_tools.description: Task-linked candidate from reviewed ontology hints.

items.source_title: Generalizing RNA velocity to transient cell states through dynamical modeling

items.metric_value: scVelo remains the canonical dynamic-model RNA velocity tool, but this critique shows that its outputs can fail or even reverse known trajectories under some conditions. Recommendation reports must include caveats about sensitivity to k-nearest-neighbor smoothing, embedding choices, and transcription/splicing/degradation model assumptions.
items.metric_unit: Cross-boundary direction correctness; phase portrait distortion; k-nearest-neighbor smoothing sensitivity
items.dataset_scope: RNA Velocity | scRNA-seq | Human embryonic forebrain data, simulated data, and controlled RNA velocity workflow analyses | RNA velocity theoretical/empirical critique; caveat evidence

candidate_tools.description: Cell2location通过整合单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）和来自给定组织的多细胞空间转录组数据，映射细胞类型的空间分布。

items.source_title: Cell2location maps fine-grained cell types in spatial transcriptomics
Benchmarking spatial and single-cell transcriptomics integration methods for transcript distribution prediction and cell type deconvolution
items.metric_value: cell2location is supported as among the top-performing methods for cell type deconvolution of spots, alongside SpatialDWLS and RCTD; do not claim unique best.
items.dataset_scope: Spatial Deconvolution | Spatial Transcriptomics | 45 paired spatial-scRNA-seq datasets and 32 simulated datasets | Spot cell type deconvolution benchmark

candidate_tools.description: CellPLM是首个编码细胞间关系的单细胞预训练语言模型，在多种下游任务中持续优于现有预训练及非预训练模型。

items.source_title: CellPLM: Pre-training of Cell Language Model Beyond Single Cells

candidate_tools.description: 一种将细胞投影到共享嵌入空间的算法，使细胞按细胞类型而非数据集特定条件分组。

items.source_title: Fast, sensitive, and accurate integration of single cell data with Harmony
Benchmarking atlas-level data integration in single-cell genomics
items.metric_value: Top-tier performance in overall integration score and computational efficiency.
items.metric_unit: Batch mixing (iLISI) and biological conservation (cLISI, ASW)
items.dataset_scope: Data Integration | scRNA-seq;scATAC-seq | 85 batches across 13 atlases | scIB atlas-level integration benchmark

candidate_tools.description: MOFA是一种因子分析模型，为无监督方式下的多组学数据整合提供了通用框架。

items.source_title: MOFA+: a statistical framework for comprehensive integration of multi-modal single-cell data
Benchmarking joint multi-omics dimensionality reduction approaches for the study of cancer
items.metric_value: In this benchmark, MOFA should not be described as the overall best clustering method; intNMF is strongest for sample clustering and MCIA is broadly robust. MOFA is supported as useful for sparse, biologically interpretable latent factors and for identifying clinically or survival-associated molecular features across multi-omics layers.
items.metric_unit: Adjusted Rand Index; C-index; log-rank p-value; enrichment score
items.dataset_scope: Multiome Integration;Joint Dimensionality Reduction | multi-omics bulk cancer;single-cell multi-omics | Simulated multi-omics datasets, TCGA cancer multi-omics datasets, and multi-omics single-cell cancer cell line data | joint dimensionality reduction benchmark; bounded factor interpretability support, not overall-best ranking

Comparison of Scanpy-based algorithms to remove the batch effect from single-cell RNA-seq data
items.metric_value: Native and wrapped Scanpy methods provide highly scalable batch correction.
items.dataset_scope: Data Integration;Batch Correction | scRNA-seq | Two representative large-scale scRNA-seq datasets | Scanpy batch-correction method comparison
